summary: Live-applied ADR 0333 on `codex/ws-0333-private-overlay` by moving the remaining active controller-local bootstrap-key and private-overlay contracts onto shared `.local` aliases, materializing the canonical bootstrap alias automatically for fresh worktrees, updating the build-server and controller automation consumers to use the shared overlay root, and re-verifying the rebased branch from the latest realistic `origin/main` while leaving the protected exact-main replay for the final merge step.

verification.check: Live controller alias materialization and preflight
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/materialize_bootstrap_key_alias.py`, `make preflight WORKFLOW=configure-edge-publication`, and `./scripts/remote_exec.sh check-build-server` all succeeded from the dedicated worktree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-bootstrap-alias-r1.json`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-preflight-configure-edge-publication-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-check-build-server-r1.txt`.

`uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest tests/test_materialize_bootstrap_key_alias.py tests/test_controller_automation_toolkit.py tests/test_preflight_controller_local.py tests/test_remote_exec.py tests/test_ephemeral_windmill_wrappers.py tests/test_provision_operator.py tests/test_validation_runner_contracts.py -q` returned `53 passed in 22.98s`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-targeted-tests-r2.txt`.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models`, `python3 scripts/workstream_registry.py --write`, `python3 scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write`, and the dependency-graph check all passed after the workstream-surface refresh, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-validate-repo-r4.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-workstream-registry-r4.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-diagrams-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-dependency-graph-r3.txt`.

`make remote-validate` reached the real remote builder first and then exercised the local fallback; the final lane summary passed `agent-standards`, `workstream-surfaces`, `atlas-lint`, `policy-validation`, `iac-policy-scan`, `alert-rule-validation`, `type-check`, and `dependency-graph`, while the heavy fallback `ansible-syntax` and `schema-validation` lanes timed out locally, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-remote-validate-r3.txt`.

`python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` still reports repository version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, and a blocked release cut because this workstream has not yet been merged to exact main and the pre-existing `controller_dependency_gap` waiver blockers remain open through `2026-04-06`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-release-status-r2.json`.

notes: This is the branch-local live-apply receipt for an ADR that changes shared controller automation contracts and live operator workflows without cutting a new numbered repo release yet.
The branch now records the canonical `.local/ssh/bootstrap.id_ed25519` alias contract and verifies it against the live controller and build-server paths on platform version `0.130.98`.
Protected exact-main surfaces and the canonical mainline receipt still need the fresh `main` replay and merge-to-`origin/main` step, which follows this branch-local closeout.
